chapter_title.en: Divine opportunity for the intelligent in others' shortcomings

text: ۳۳۱. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): إِنَّ اللهَ سُبْحَانَهُ جَعَلَ الطَّاعَةَ غَنِيمَةَ الْأَكْيَاسِ عِنْدَ تَفْرِيطِ الْعَجَزَةِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 331. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: When the disabled fall short in performing acts of obedience to Allāh, the Glorified, it is a good opportunity given by Allāh for the intelligent to perform such acts.
